entries.statement: Design, train, evaluate, and document machine learning models, including feature engineering decisions, algorithm selection rationale, and evaluation results against baseline.
Prepare model documentation for production deployment, including model card, performance characteristics, known limitations, and monitoring recommendations.
Conduct post-deployment model monitoring, identifying performance degradation, data drift, and conditions requiring model retraining or replacement.
Implement model monitoring dashboards and alerting, including performance degradation thresholds, drift detection, and incident response procedures.
Build and maintain ML training pipelines, including data ingestion, preprocessing, training, evaluation, and model registration steps.
Design and build LLM-based application systems, including system prompt design, tool integration, retrieval pipeline, output validation, and failure mode documentation.
Evaluate AI application performance against defined quality, safety, and reliability criteria, documenting test results and identified failure modes.
Design and implement NLP systems for defined business tasks, including model selection, data preparation, fine-tuning, evaluation, and deployment documentation.
Conduct linguistic analysis and error analysis on NLP system outputs, documenting failure patterns and recommending model or data improvements.
Design and build computer vision systems for defined business applications, including dataset preparation, model training, evaluation, deployment, and performance monitoring.
Design and document the enterprise ML platform architecture, including training infrastructure, feature store design, model registry, serving layer, and monitoring stack.
Define MLOps standards and pipeline templates that enable data science teams to move models to production without bespoke engineering effort for each use case.
Evaluate and select ML platform tooling, producing architectural decision records with documented rationale and re-evaluation criteria.
Collaborate with data architects and analysts to translate data consumption requirements into pipeline designs and storage structures.
Provision, configure, and maintain the data platform infrastructure, including compute environments, storage systems, networking, and security controls.
Build and maintain automated ML pipelines from feature engineering through model training, validation, deployment, and monitoring, ensuring reproducibility and auditability at every stage.

Implement model monitoring and observability systems that detect data drift, prediction drift, and performance degradation, triggering alerts or automated retraining workflows when defined thresholds are exceeded.
Design and execute research projects that advance organizational AI capability, including hypothesis formulation, experimental design, execution, and findings documentation.
Manage the enterprise AI innovation pipeline, including ideation facilitation, use case triage, prototype development prioritization, and POC results communication.
Build and deliver AI proof-of-concepts for high-priority use cases, documenting technical approach, results, limitations, and production readiness assessment.
Execute routine data platform maintenance tasks, including storage cleanup, job configuration updates, and operational documentation maintenance.
